title: Nvidia's outlook will be a test of its strategy to maintain AI dominance
summary: Nvidia anticipates strong earnings but faces new competition in AI chips. Demand is shifting to processors that run AI in real-time, a market where rivals like Alphabet and Amazon are making strides. Traditional players Intel and AMD are also pushing new chips.
